daily.title: Make bed + 10 min tidy
daily.description: Win the first 10 minutes of the day.

daily.title: Train / move the body
daily.description: Gym, run, or a real walk. Counts if you sweat or strain.

daily.title: Deep-work block (90 min)
daily.description: One uninterrupted block on the thing that matters most.

daily.title: Plan tomorrow (5 min)
daily.description: Write the top 3 before you sleep.

weekly.title: Weekly review
weekly.description: Look back at the log. What worked, what slipped.

weekly.title: One hard thing
weekly.description: The task you've been avoiding all week. Do it.

weekly.title: Rest + recover day
weekly.description: One deliberate low day. Recovery is part of the routine.
